name: jira
description: Search, create, and manage Jira issues and projects

envVars.name: ATLASSIAN_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Atlassian OAuth 2.0 Client ID (from your app)

tools.name: Search Issues
tools.description: Search Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language)

tools.name: Get Issue
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Jira issue

tools.name: Create Issue
tools.description: Create a new Jira issue in a project

tools.name: Update Issue
tools.description: Update an existing Jira issue (status, fields, etc.)

prompts.title: Find open bugs
prompts.prompt: Search for all open bugs assigned to me or in my current sprint.

prompts.title: Create a task
prompts.prompt: Create a new task in Jira with a title, description, and priority.

prompts.title: Sprint summary
prompts.prompt: Get a summary of all issues in the current sprint, organized by status.

prompts.title: Update issue status
prompts.prompt: Move an issue to a different status (To Do, In Progress, Done, etc.).
